response_modes.label: None
response_modes.description: No rewrite mode applies because the message passed.

response_modes.label: Tone
response_modes.description: The message needs tone or delivery changes.

response_modes.label: Polish
response_modes.description: The tone is fine, but the writing needs cleanup.

response_modes.label: Tone and polish
response_modes.description: The message needs both delivery and writing changes.

intent_modes.label: De-escalating
intent_modes.description: Lowers conflict without avoiding the issue.

intent_modes.label: Boundary
intent_modes.description: Firm, explicit limits with respectful framing.
